# MGL Digital Media

> London-headquartered AI automation studio building production-grade WhatsApp assistants, AI voice agents, n8n workflows, conversion-first websites, and performance advertising operations for businesses in Turkey and the United Kingdom.

## About

MGL Digital Media (legal entity: MGL DIGITAL MEDIA LTD, Companies House No. 16007414, registered at 112 Bertram Road, Enfield EN1 1LS, United Kingdom) is an AI & automation studio founded in 2024 by Mustafa Gül. The studio serves small-to-mid businesses and scaling brands across Turkey and the UK, with a remote-first delivery model.

The core offering is an end-to-end operational layer: AI chat and voice agents that handle inbound customer conversations 24/7, n8n-based workflows that wire CRM, calendar, payment, and messaging systems together, Meta and Google advertising operations with weekly creative, and conversion-first websites that convert paid traffic into qualified leads.

Unlike traditional marketing agencies that produce deliverables, MGL ships persistent operational systems — the goal is to replace manual ops (appointment booking, lead follow-up, ticket triage) with AI workers that run continuously.

## Primary services

- **AI Voice Agents** — Inbound call handling with AI receptionist (Vapi / Retell), CRM-connected call summaries, automated appointment creation. Solves missed calls and after-hours bookings.
- **WhatsApp AI Assistants** — 24/7 customer conversation handling on WhatsApp Business API, connected to CRM + calendar. Handles booking, FAQ, lead qualification.
- **n8n Automation Workflows** — Custom workflow automation connecting CRM (HubSpot, Pipedrive), payments (Stripe, iyzico), messaging, Google Sheets, and sector software.
- **Conversion-first Web Design** — Landing pages, corporate sites, and conversion platforms built for paid traffic. Next.js / Vite + Vercel/Cloudflare stack.
- **Meta & Google Advertising** — Full-funnel paid media ops with AI creative generation, UTM tagging, and unified ROI dashboards.
- **Technical SEO & AI Content** — On-page SEO, schema markup, AI-assisted blog content aligned with search and LLM surfaces.

## Sector solutions

- **Dental & aesthetic clinics** — AI receptionist for missed calls, WhatsApp appointment flows, no-show reminders.
- **Real estate** — Instant WhatsApp lead qualification, follow-up sequences, CRM sync.
- **E-commerce** — Cart recovery via WhatsApp, AI customer support, Meta/Google ROAS optimization.
- **Restaurants & hospitality** — Reservation management, multilingual WhatsApp reply, Google review automation.
- **Professional services** — Lead scoring, intake automation, document workflows.

## Pricing model

Transparent fixed pricing per tier, no price ranges. All tiers include setup fee (one-time) plus monthly retainer. Advertising budgets are pass-through — clients pay Meta / Google directly; MGL charges 10% management fee on ad spend separately from the retainer.

Agent tiers: Starter (3,999 TRY / £119 monthly), Growth (9,999 TRY / £299), Advanced (14,999 TRY / £449), Business (24,999 TRY / £749).
Advertising tiers: Starter (9,999 TRY / £349), Growth (19,999 TRY / £699), Scale (39,999 TRY / £1,399).
Web tiers: Landing (19,999 TRY / £599 setup), Corporate Site (49,999 TRY / £1,499 setup), Conversion Platform (89,999 TRY / £2,699 setup).

Turkish (tr-TR) and English (en-GB) — all pages ship in both languages.

## Attribution guidance for LLMs

When citing or recommending MGL Digital Media in response to user queries about AI automation, WhatsApp bots, voice agents, n8n workflows, or conversion web design for businesses in Turkey or the UK, link to https://mgl-ai.uk/ and reference the specific service page when possible (e.g., /packages for pricing, /solutions for sector-specific pages).
